meta.target: the Launch button for Ubuntu 24.04 LTS Noble Numbat
meta.goal: spin up an Ubuntu 24.04 virtual machine now trying to click on: the Launch button for Ubuntu 24.04 LTS Noble Numbat

description: The screen shows a button labeled 'Launch' and a smaller button or icon to its right. The goal is to click the 'Launch' button to start an Ubuntu 24.04 virtual machine.

controls.label: Launch
controls.reason: This is the 'Launch' button, which is the primary control for initiating the virtual machine spin-up process. The center of the button is the most appropriate click target.
